headline: Arch Capital Group Ltd. (NASDAQ:ACGL) Reports Strong Q1 2026 Earnings Beat Amid Mixed Revenue Results
summary: Arch Capital Group reported strong Q1 2026 earnings with a $2.50 EPS, beating estimates, though revenue fell short. Key highlights include a surge in underwriting income and a sharp drop in catastrophe losses.

headline: Arch Capital (ACGL) Q3 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: As cycle managers who lean into the strikes of our brand, including underwriting discipline and using risk-based pricing tools to generate profitable business.  Critically, our strong balance sheet and strong capital-generating capabilities permits us to both invest in our business and return capital to investors.

headline: Arch Capital (ACGL) Q2 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: This disciplined underwriting approach paired with proactive capital management positions us to consistently generate superior returns across market cycles.  This not only reflects Arch's increased scale, but also the increased relevance of our platform, one built on a broad and flexible set of capabilities.  This principle was reinforced last month where Paul Ingrey, Arch's former Chairman and one of its founder, spoke to a gathering of our top leaders.

headline: Assessing Arch Capital Group (ACGL) Valuation After Recent Return Trends And Analyst Discount Estimates
summary: Assessing Arch Capital Group after recent performance data With no single headline event driving attention, Arch Capital Group (ACGL) is drawing interest as investors reassess the insurer in light of recent return figures, current valuation metrics, and its latest annual revenue and net income data.
